user.title: PRESolidsun FVE Login
user.description: Connect your PRESolidsun photovoltaic plant. You can find your credentials in your contract. If you don't have them, request them at [info@solidsun.cz](mailto:info@solidsun.cz).

data_description.case_number: Enter the case number from your contract (e.g. OP-22-39020).
data_description.password: The password assigned by PRESolidsun s.r.o.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your case number and password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to PRESolidsun server. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This FVE (case number) is already configured.
